name: Neon Cyber
description: Deep-navy canvas with electric cyan + magenta glow and Clash Display + Satoshi typography. Signature: cyan grid + dual-tone neon outline. Futurist cyberpunk for AI, web3, security and future-tech content.
descriptionZh: 深海军底 + 电光青 + 玫红双霓虹 + Clash Display / Satoshi 字体。签名：青色发光网格 + 双色霓虹描边。赛博朋克未来派审美。
bestFor: 赛博朋克 / 科幻话题
